output.title: Implement Retry Policy for Payment Webhook Processing
output.summary: This pull request introduces a retry policy for processing payment webhooks, implementing exponential backoff for transient failures and ensuring failed events are sent to a dead-letter queue.
changes: Added exponential backoff retry logic for processing payment events.
Implemented dead-letter queue handling for failed payment webhook events.
testPlan: Test that the webhook handler retries processing up to 5 times for transient failures.
Verify that failed events are correctly published to the dead-letter queue.
Ensure that retry metrics are emitted for observability.
Check that no duplicate charges occur when replaying events.
risks: Potential for increased latency in processing if retries are triggered frequently.
Need to ensure that the dead-letter queue is monitored and processed appropriately.
output.rolloutNotes: Monitor the performance of the webhook handler after deployment to ensure that the retry logic is functioning as expected and that no duplicate charges occur.

output.title: Add retry policy for payment webhook processing
output.summary: This PR implements an exponential backoff retry policy for processing payment webhooks, adds dead-letter queue handling for failed events, and ensures observability through retry metrics.
changes: Added exponential backoff retry mechanism for webhook processing with a maximum of 5 retries.
Implemented dead-letter queue handling for events that fail after retries.
testPlan: Test that the webhook handler retries processing up to 5 times for transient failures.
Verify that failed events are correctly published to the dead-letter queue.
Check that retry metrics are emitted for observability.
Ensure that no duplicate charges occur when replaying events.
risks: Potential for increased load on the system during peak traffic if retries are not managed properly.
Need to ensure that the dead-letter queue is monitored and managed to prevent data loss.
output.rolloutNotes: Monitor the performance of the webhook handler after deployment to ensure that the retry mechanism is functioning as expected and that the dead-letter queue is being populated correctly.
